description: CTX hook registrations. Hooks run from ~/.claude/hooks/ (installed by ctx-install). SessionStart probes and auto-starts both vec-daemon and bge-daemon.

hooks.command: bash -c 'python3 -m venv "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/.ctx-venv" 2>/dev/null; PY="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/.ctx-venv/bin/python3"; $PY -m pip install --quiet ctx-retriever rank_bm25 numpy sqlite-vec 2>/dev/null; $PY -m ctx_retriever.cli.install 2>/dev/null || echo "[CTX] ctx-install complete"'

bash -c 'VD=$HOME/.local/share/claude-vault; if python3 -c "import sentence_transformers" 2>/dev/null; then python3 -c "import socket,os; s=socket.socket(socket.AF_UNIX); s.settimeout(0.3); s.connect(os.path.expanduser(\"~/.local/share/claude-vault/vec-daemon.sock\"))" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f $VD/vec-daemon.sock; nohup python3 $VD/vec-daemon.py > /tmp/vec-daemon.log 2>&1 & }; python3 -c "import socket,os; s=socket.socket(socket.AF_UNIX); s.settimeout(0.3); s.connect(os.path.expanduser(\"~/.local/share/claude-vault/bge-daemon.sock\"))" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f $VD/bge-daemon.sock; nohup python3 $VD/bge-daemon.py > /tmp/bge-daemon.log 2>&1 & }; else echo "[CTX] sentence_transformers not found — semantic layer disabled. Install: pip install ctx-retriever[dense]" > /tmp/ctx-daemon-hint.txt; fi'
